articles.title: Coinbase-Backed Base Hits 6M Daily Transactions, Leads Layer-2 Race
articles.description: Coinbase-backed Base surpasses 6 million daily transactions, outpacing rivals like Arbitrum and Optimism, driven by its integration with Coinbase and rapid growth.

articles.title: Cardano Is Evolving, Not Failing – Charles Hoskinson
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano (ADA), has addressed the rising negative sentiment surrounding his project on social media.
